short_desc.zh: 適合冷鏈與高濕作業、支援資料採集的防水智能秤
short_desc.en: A waterproof smart scale for cold-chain and high-humidity operations with data capture support

desc.zh: 可直接沖洗，適合高濕與清洗頻繁的智能作業環境
desc.en: Washable and suitable for humid, frequently cleaned smart operations

desc.zh: 進口感測模組，維持穩定準確的智能秤讀值
desc.en: Imported sensing module delivers stable and accurate smart-scale readings

desc.zh: 支援資料輸出，可接入 WMS、ERP 與現場採集流程
desc.en: Supports data output for WMS, ERP, and on-site collection workflows

desc.zh: 內建高容量電池，滿足移動或高頻作業場景
desc.en: Built-in high-capacity battery for mobile or high-frequency operations

applications.zh: 適合海鮮處理、食品加工、冷鏈倉儲等需要防水與資料可追溯的智能稱重場景。
applications.en: Suitable for seafood processing, food production, and cold-chain storage where waterproofing and traceable smart weighing are required.

desc.zh: 整機 IP68 防護，可直接沖洗，滿足高濕現場需求
desc.en: Full IP68 protection for direct washing in humid environments

desc.zh: 可作為冷鏈智能秤終端，對接掃描、標籤與系統流程
desc.en: Acts as a cold-chain smart scale terminal for scanning, labeling, and system workflows

desc.zh: 高耐腐蝕感測與秤體結構，適合長期潮濕環境
desc.en: Corrosion-resistant sensing and body structure for long-term humid operation

desc.zh: 適合需要移動使用或不便長時間插電的場景
desc.en: Ideal for mobile use or environments where constant power is inconvenient

q.zh: 這台防水智能秤適合冷鏈嗎？
q.en: Is this waterproof smart scale suitable for cold-chain use?

a.zh: 適合，IP68 防護與防水操作設計可滿足冷鏈與高濕倉儲作業。
a.en: Yes. Its IP68 protection and waterproof operation design fit cold-chain and humid warehouse scenarios.

q.zh: 資料可以上傳到系統嗎？
q.en: Can the data be uploaded into a system?

a.zh: 可以，支援通訊輸出，可作為 WMS / ERP 的智能秤資料來源。
a.en: Yes. It supports communication output and can serve as a smart-scale data source for WMS or ERP.

a.zh: 支持定制秤台尺寸、承重範圍與通訊需求。
a.en: Yes. Platform size, capacity range, and communication needs can be customized.

q.zh: 是否可接電腦與工控機？
q.en: Can it connect to PCs and industrial computers?

a.zh: 支持 RS232 / RS485 通訊，可接入電腦、工控機與現場管理設備。
a.en: It supports RS232 / RS485 and can connect to PCs, industrial computers, and on-site management devices.

sceneTitle.zh: 在防水秤體上擴充掃描、列印與資料留存
sceneTitle.en: Expand a waterproof scale with scanning, printing, and traceable data capture.

sceneDescription.zh: 把防水智能秤延伸成冷鏈現場資料節點，支援高濕環境的配件整合。
sceneDescription.en: Turn the waterproof smart scale into a data node for cold-chain operations with humid-environment accessory support.

title.zh: 若裝置效能不足，會先以靜態視覺保留產品理解與配置導覽
title.en: If device performance is limited, the experience switches to a static visual mode while preserving product understanding and configuration guidance.

description.zh: 這個 fallback 主要用於 reduced motion、低效能裝置與尚未導入正式 GLB 模型的階段。
description.en: This fallback is used for reduced motion, low-power devices, and the pre-GLB stage before production models are delivered.

description.zh: 看防水結構與基本配置
description.en: View the waterproof structure and base setup.

description.zh: 聚焦操作面板與使用動線
description.en: Focus on the terminal display and input area.

description.zh: 觀察接口與防護結構整合
description.en: Inspect interface placement and protected integration.

description.zh: 冷鏈流程條碼辨識與資料追溯。
description.en: Barcode recognition and traceability for cold-chain workflows.

description.zh: 快速離線轉存與稽核取樣。
description.en: Quick offline export and audit sampling.

description.zh: 列印冷鏈標籤與批次資訊。
description.en: Print cold-chain labels and batch information.

description.zh: 保留現場影像與檢驗紀錄。
description.en: Keep on-site imagery and inspection records.

description.zh: 連接外部號誌燈與工業訊號。
description.en: Connect tower lights and industrial signals.

title.zh: 先用整體總覽，建立防水智能秤的耐候與系統感
title.en: Start with the overall view to establish the waterproof smart scale’s durability and system presence.

description.zh: 這一幕讓客戶先看到防水秤體、穩定結構與基本配置，理解它不是單純秤重，而是可擴充的冷鏈資料節點。
description.en: This scene shows the waterproof body, stable structure, and base setup first, framing it not as a simple scale but as an expandable cold-chain data node.

bullets.en: Waterproof body with durable structural design

bullets.zh: 適合作為冷鏈現場資料終端
bullets.en: Suitable as a cold-chain on-site data terminal

bullets.zh: 用總覽先建立產品定位
bullets.en: Use the overview to anchor product positioning

title.zh: 放大操作面板，讓智能秤像可執行流程的終端設備
title.en: Zoom into the control surface so the smart scale reads like an operational terminal.

description.zh: 這一幕把防水智能秤從硬體外觀帶向實際操作流程，突顯它可以承接輸入、顯示與判讀任務。
description.en: This scene moves from physical form into operation, showing how the waterproof smart scale handles input, display, and decision-making tasks.

bullets.zh: 在高濕現場仍維持可讀與可操作
bullets.en: Remains readable and operable in high-humidity environments

bullets.zh: 是現場輸入與回饋的交會點
bullets.en: Acts as the meeting point for input and feedback

bullets.zh: 讓產品更像系統界面而非單機設備
bullets.en: Makes the product feel like a system interface, not an isolated device

title.zh: 掃碼槍接入後，冷鏈流程開始和智能秤同步
title.en: Once the scanner is connected, the cold-chain process starts syncing with the smart scale.

description.zh: 條碼辨識讓批次、物料與重量資訊在同一流程中完成，降低冷鏈現場人工轉錄風險。
description.en: Barcode capture brings batch, material, and weight information into one flow, reducing manual transcription risk in cold-chain operations.

bullets.zh: 批次辨識與重量記錄同步完成
bullets.en: Batch identification and weight capture happen together

bullets.zh: 降低高濕環境中的人工錯誤
bullets.en: Reduces manual error in wet environments

bullets.zh: 讓智能秤成為流程節點
bullets.en: Turns the smart scale into a workflow node

title.zh: 列印機與 GPIO 讓防水智能秤延伸成現場流程控制中心
title.en: Printer and GPIO turn the waterproof smart scale into an on-site process control center.

description.zh: 標籤輸出與號誌控制把現場操作變得可執行、可提示、可追溯，強化冷鏈現場節奏。
description.en: Label output and signal control make on-site work executable, guided, and traceable, improving rhythm in cold-chain operations.

bullets.zh: 標籤輸出支援追溯與批次管理
bullets.en: Label output supports traceability and batch control

bullets.zh: GPIO 對接訊號燈與現場控制
bullets.en: GPIO links into tower lights and site controls

bullets.zh: 把防水智能秤變成流程中樞
bullets.en: Transforms the waterproof smart scale into a process hub

title.zh: 攝像頭補上影像留證，讓防水智能秤完成可追溯閉環
title.en: The camera adds visual evidence capture, completing a traceable closed loop for the waterproof smart scale.

description.zh: 在冷鏈、檢驗與高規範場景中，影像與重量資料並行記錄，能讓智能秤提升到更高層級的管控工具。
description.en: In cold-chain, inspection, and highly regulated scenarios, simultaneous image and weight records elevate the smart scale into a higher-grade control tool.

bullets.zh: 影像與重量資料同時保留
bullets.en: Image and weight data are preserved together

bullets.zh: 支援異常稽核與檢驗證據
bullets.en: Supports exception auditing and inspection evidence

bullets.zh: 完成防水智能秤的高階場景敘事
bullets.en: Completes the high-end narrative for the waterproof smart scale
